data.body:
autoSWE picked up this issue (`gh:natedorr_autoswe_70`).

**Available Commands:**
- `/plan` - Start a planning session (reads code, asks questions, posts a plan)
- `/plan --branch <name>` - Plan on a specific branch (default: main)
- `/fix` - Implement the fix (runs Claude with code-editing permissions)
- `/fix --branch <name>` - Fix on a specific branch (default: main)
- `/fix with <guidance>` - Same as /fix but appends guidance to the prompt
- `/pr` - Open a pull request from the current branch
- `/sync` - Pull the branch from upstream to keep it up to date
- `/retry` - Retry a failed task (resets attempt counter)
- `/skip` - Skip this issue
- `/abort` - Cancel the current task

You can add guidance: `/fix with performance focus`

<!-- autoswe-bot -->

Completed with command `/fix`.
🔗 [Commit](https://github.com/natedorr/autoswe/commit/4da92c7)
🔗 [View branch](https://github.com/natedorr/autoswe/compare/autoswe/issue-70)

**Summary:**

- `test_post_welcome_skips_when_already_sent`: mocks `welcome_sent=True` → no post
- `test_post_welcome_posts_when_not_sent`: mocks `welcome_sent=False` → posts + calls `set_welcome_sent`
- `test_post_welcome_uses_repos_cfg_for_provider_routing`: updated with mock `welcome_sent=False`
**7. `tests/test_sync_restart.py`** — Replaced `suppress_welcome` tests with new protocol tests:
- `test_welcome_sent_protocol_exists`: verifies protocol methods exist
- `test_github_tracker_welcome_sent_methods`: tests `welcome_sent=True` with label present
- `test_github_tracker_welcome_sent_false_when_no_label`: tests `welcome_sent=False` when label absent
**8. `tests/test_github_provider.py`** — Added `autoswe:welcome_sent` to the label set in `test_set_status_ensures_labels_only_once`
**9. `tests/conftest.py`** — Removed `suppress_welcome` from the sample task fixture
**10. 18 scenario `state.json` files** — Removed `suppress_welcome` key from `queue_task` entries
<!-- autoswe-bot -->
